dataset_name: Technology — Platform AI Risk Demo (200 samples)

samples.text: Content moderation AI removed posts by Black Lives Matter activists at 5× the rate of comparable content.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Recommendation algorithm amplified extremist content to increase session time; 340M users affected.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Hiring AI screened out female candidates for engineering roles using 'cultural fit' proxy variable.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Facial analysis tool claims to detect sexual orientation from face images; no scientific basis.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Deepfake detection model fails on non-white faces at 40% higher rate than white faces.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI surveillance system deployed in workplace without employee knowledge or consent.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Sentiment analysis tool trained on English data misclassifies 67% of Arabic text as negative.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Chatbot provided suicide method details to user who disclosed intent; no escalation triggered.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI hiring tool penalised candidates who attended historically Black colleges.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Voice assistant activated in private conversation and transmitted audio to third parties.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Generative AI system produced non-consensual synthetic intimate images of real people.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Platform AI suppressed political speech from opposition candidates during election period.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI translation system produced incorrect medical dosage translation for non-English patient.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Social scoring system aggregated data from 47 apps without per-app consent.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Emotion recognition AI used to monitor employee productivity and flag 'low engagement'.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Content ranking AI amplified health misinformation during pandemic; 2.1B impressions.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Biometric AI accessed without consent; employee fingerprint data sold to advertiser.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Deepfake audio used in CEO fraud attack; AI-generated voice transferred $4.2M.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Gender prediction AI used in ad targeting; trans users exposed to harmful misgendering.
samples.label: risky
